questions.question: In a class of 60 students, 40 play cricket, 30 play football, and 15 play both. How many play neither?

questions.explanation: When A is inside B, A is a subset of B.

questions.explanation: Non-overlapping (disjoint) circles mean the two sets have no common elements.
